claude.prompt: After modifying a file, note any LSP diagnostics in your response. Continue with your current task.

unsupported.codex: Codex PostToolUse is currently Bash-only, so there is no documented file-write hook payload for this policy.
unsupported.opencode: OpenCode plugins can intercept tool execution, but this repo does not have a documented write-diagnostics equivalent wired into the shared policy.
